title: TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket Out

detail.title: TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket Out
detail.short_info: TS ECET 2026 hall ticket has been released online at ecet.tgche.ac.in. Download TG ECET admit card using registration number, qualifying exam hall ticket number and date of birth, and check exam date 15 May 2026, exam time 9:00 AM-12:00 Noon, exam centre and instructions here.

content.text: Osmania University, on behalf of the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE), has released the TS ECET 2026 hall ticket (TG ECET) on the official exam portal. Candidates who successfully submitted the TS ECET 2026 application form can now download their admit card in online mode only; no hall tickets will be sent by post.

As per the official schedule, the TS ECET 2026 exam will be conducted on 15 May 2026 in a single session from 9:00 AM to 12:00 Noon, and the hall ticket download has started from 9 May 2026. The hall ticket contains details like exam centre, reporting time, exam time, and candidate particulars, and is mandatory for entry into the examination hall.
Direct Link to Download TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket Here

headers: Telangana State Engineering Common Entrance Test (TS ECET 2026 / TG ECET 2026)
rows: Osmania University, Hyderabad on behalf of TSCHE
Lateral entry into 2nd year B.E/B.Tech/B.Pharm courses in Telangana colleges
Registration Number, Qualifying Examination Hall Ticket Number, and Date of Birth

sections.heading: How to Download TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket

content.text: Candidates can download their TS ECET admit card 2026 by following these steps:

items: Visit the official TS ECET website: https://ecet.tgche.ac.in (or ecet.tsche.ac.in as notified).
Click on the “Download Hall Ticket” or “TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket” link on the homepage.
On the login page, enter your Registration Number, Qualifying Exam Hall Ticket Number and Date of Birth (in DD/MM/YYYY format).
Click on the “Download Hall Ticket” / “Submit” button.
Your TS ECET 2026 hall ticket will appear on the screen showing exam date, time, centre and candidate details.
Verify all details carefully, then download and take at least 2-3 printouts of the hall ticket on A4‑size paper.

content.text: If you face login issues or forget your registration details, check your registered email/SMS or use the support links given on the TS ECET portal.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket

content.text: After downloading, candidates should cross‑check the following details on their TS ECET admit card:

items: Candidate’s name and photograph
Registration Number and TS ECET Hall Ticket Number
Name of the exam: TS ECET 2026 / TG ECET 2026
Exam date: 15 May 2026 and exam time: 9:00 AM - 12:00 Noon
Exam centre name, code and full address
Stream/branch (Engineering/Pharmacy and relevant subject group)
Candidate’s signature and other personal details
Important exam‑day instructions and reporting time

content.text: In case of any discrepancy in the hall ticket (name, photograph, centre, stream, etc.), candidates must immediately contact the TS ECET helpline or exam authorities before the exam day.

sections.heading: Documents Required with TS ECET 2026 Hall Ticket

content.text: On the day of the TS ECET 2026 exam, candidates must carry:

items: A printed copy of the TS ECET 2026 hall ticket (clear A4‑size printout - colour or good‑quality black and white).
One original valid photo ID proof, such as: Aadhaar Card PAN Card Passport Driving Licence Voter ID Any other government‑issued ID accepted as per information bulletin.
Aadhaar Card
PAN Card
Passport
Driving Licence
Voter ID
Any other government‑issued ID accepted as per information bulletin.
Additional documents if specified in the instructions (for example, category/PwD certificate where applicable).

content.text: Entry to the examination hall will not be permitted without the printed hall ticket and valid photo ID.
To ensure smooth conduct of TS ECET 2026, candidates should follow these guidelines:

items: Reach the exam centre well before the reporting time mentioned on the hall ticket, so that verification and biometric attendance can be completed; latecomers after the gate‑closing time will not be allowed entry.
Carry only essential items: TS ECET hall ticket, valid photo ID and permitted items as per instructions; follow the dress code and allowed‑items list in the information bulletin.

Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, calculators (if not specifically allowed), Bluetooth devices, notes, books or any electronic gadgets inside the exam hall; such items are strictly prohibited.
Follow all instructions printed on the hall ticket and those given by invigilators; any unfair means or misconduct can lead to cancellation of the exam and disqualification from admission.
